case_title: VAN LINGEN, JOOP N. VS KWAN, DENNIS

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $250.00 FILED BY KWAN, DENNIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT VAN LINGEN, JOOP N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, DENNIS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, DENNIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,738.55 FILED BY VAN LINGEN, JOOP N. AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
CERT MAIL TO VAN LINGEN, JOOP RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN LINGEN, JOOP N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KWAN, DENNIS $2,738.55 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,758.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KWAN, DENNIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VAN LINGEN, JOOP N. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
